title: vepris glomerata
intro: Vepris glomerata, also known as African yellow myrtle, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The medicinal properties of Vepris glomerata include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential use in treating fever, pain, and infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Vepris glomerata can be used in various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, decoctions, and infusions, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
